query: CPU usage has stayed above 80% for five minutes. How should I troubleshoot it?
HighCPUUsage alert was triggered. Which logs and metrics should be checked?
The service is slow and system load is high because CPU is saturated.
How do I analyze a container with cpu_usage greater than 80 percent?
What handling plan should I follow for a serious CPU utilization alarm?
Memory usage has been above 85% and the application may hit OOM.
HighMemoryUsage alert appeared. How should I investigate GC and memory leaks?
The server is swapping frequently and performance dropped sharply.
How do I troubleshoot event OOM or memory_usage above 85?
The container keeps restarting because of excessive memory consumption.
Disk usage is over 90% and the application cannot write new data.
HighDiskUsage alert was triggered. What cleanup and inspection steps are needed?
Logs cannot be written because the filesystem is almost full.
How should I handle disk_full true or disk_usage above 80?
Database may be damaged because available disk space is too low.
ServiceUnavailable alert: health checks are failing and users cannot access the service.
The service error rate is above 50% and business traffic is interrupted.
How do I investigate level ERROR, FATAL, or status 500 for an unavailable service?
The application health endpoint failed continuously. What emergency diagnosis should I run?
A critical outage makes the service completely unreachable.
P99 response time has exceeded 3 seconds for several minutes.
SlowResponse alert was triggered. How should I diagnose slow queries and latency?
Requests are piling up and downstream services may time out.
How do I troubleshoot response_time greater than 3000 milliseconds?
The service is still available but user experience is poor because responses are too slow.
